query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.estimatedInstallDate, p.tentativeInstallDate, c.name as client_name
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Ruth%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.status, p.estimatedInstallDate, p.tentativeInstallDate, c.name as client_name
FROM projects p 
LEFT JOIN clients c ON p.clientId = c.id 
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Ruth%';
